pinyin: tu4 zi5 bu4 chi1 wo1 bian1 cao3
defs: lit. a rabbit never eats the grass beside its own burrow (saying)
fig. even a scoundrel does not do harm in his immediate neighborhood

pinyin: tu4 zi5 wei3 ba5 chang2 bu5 liao3

defs: Tuzki, a Chinese cartoon rabbit character used in emoticons and stickers, created in 2006
lit. if the rabbit dies, the fox grieves (idiom); fig. to have sympathy with a like-minded person in distress
lit. to boil the hound once it caught the rabbit (idiom)
fig. to get rid of sb once he has served his purpose
